title: Financial Services (Fees) (Amendment) Regulations 2026
text:
SECOND SUPPLEMENT TO THE GIBRALTAR
GAZETTE
No. 5297 GIBRALTAR Thursday 9th April 2026
LEGAL NOTICE NO. 72 OF 2026
FINANCIAL SERVICES ACT 2019
FINANCIAL SERVICES (FEES) (AMENDMENT) REGULATIONS 2026
In exercise of the powers conferred on the Minister by sections 620, 624 and 627 of the
Financial Services Act 2019 the Minister has made these Regulations–
Title.
1. These Regulations may be cited as the Financial Services (Fees) (Amendment) Regulations
2026.
Commencement.
2. These Regulations are deemed to have come into operation on 1st April 2026.
Amendment of the Financial Services (Fees) Regulations 2020.
3.(1) Schedule 1 to the Financial Services (Fees) Regulations 2020 is amended as follows.
(2) In Fee Block C1, in the first entry (audit firms and statutory auditors), in the third column,
for “£17,012” substitute “£17,522”.
N FEETHAM KC,
Minister with responsibility for Financial Services.
___________________________
EXPLANATORY MEMORANDUM
These Regulations amend Schedule 1 to the Financial Services (Fees) Regulations 2020.
